<template>
    <Tabs value="/">
         <TabList>
        <Tab value="0">Header I</Tab>
        <Tab value="1">Header II</Tab>
        <Tab value="2">Header III</Tab>
    </TabList>
    </Tabs>
</template>

<script>
import { Tab, TabList, Tabs } from 'primevue';

export default {
    components: {
        Tabs,TabList,Tab
    },
    data() {
        return {
            items: [
                { label: 'tab 1', route: 'rute 1', icon: 'pi-home' },
                { label: 'tab 1', route: 'rute 1', icon: 'pi-home' },
                { label: 'tab 1', route: 'rute 1', icon: 'pi-home' },
                { label: 'tab 1', route: 'rute 1', icon: 'pi-home' },
                { label: 'tab 1', route: 'rute 1', icon: 'pi-home' },

            ]
        }
    }
}
</script>

<style></style>
